reason: A music teacher’s epic quest to compose the perfect opus unfolds over decades of trials.
An indie band’s roller-coaster sprint to craft a hit single pulses with creative breakthroughs.
Mock-umentary explores a rock band’s absurd antics as they struggle to record their next album.
A charismatic frontman’s rise and inner battles expose the price of musical genius.
A fictional singer-songwriter fights industry setbacks and her own doubts on the road to stardom.
A loan shark reinvents himself as a Hollywood producer, chasing that perfect script with theatrical flair.
A convenience-store clerk dreams of rock ’n’ roll, balancing mundane life with creative urges.
A quirky comic artist finds inspiration in blues, sketching his way to artistic breakthroughs.
A pirate’s ballad becomes a quest for the perfect tune, mixing danger with melodic invention.
Genetic potential charts a hidden musical genius, probing the ethics of engineered talent.
